title: juncus heldreichianus subsp. orientalis
intro: Juncus heldreichianus subsp. orientalis, also known as Eastern Rush or Oriental Rush, is a subspecies of the Juncus heldreichianus plant, a type of rush that belongs to the Juncaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Juncus heldreichianus subsp. orientalis include treating wounds, reducing pain and swelling, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
